features: Carefully formulated to keep the body protected against biting insects.
description: Send away those pesky mosquitoes and insect with this natural but effective repellent. Carefully formulated to keep the body protected against biting insects yet is soothing to the skin. It's deet free so its suitable for all the family. Bug season! It's a great time for you and your pets to be outside in the lovely weather, but you have to find a way to deal with the bugs. DEET-free natural insect repellent containing Johnsons's own special blend ingredients whose aromas are pleasing and attractive to humans, yet keep the bugs away. Tropical Formula: Naturally Repels Mosquitoes, Ticks, Gnats, Chiggers, Ants, Fleas and more; DEET Free, Chemical-Free and has a Soothing Pleasant Aroma.
